text:
Once upon an age-long ago in a verdant valley surrounded by mountains so high they looked like clouds at dawn, there lived a curious fox named Felix. Felix loved exploring every nook of his valley. On a particular morning, he spotted something shining atop the highest peak. It was a peculiar crystal sphere, so beautiful it seemed to glow softly in the dawn light.

Wanting to know more, Felix scaled the mountain. As he approached, he noticed it had a door carved into its side. Intrigued, he pushed it open. Inside, dim light streamed from crystals that shaped like moons. A quiet voice greeted him.

"Well met, little fox," it said, twinkling warmly. "Humans rarely descend into those depths. What brings you shining treasure?"

Felix hesitated, pondering how best to describe his discovery. "A gift," he said softly. "From the stars...?"

"A treasure indeed. The Moonmoons whisper secrets to those bold enough to listen. Tell
